_meta.template_name: Owens Corning TruDefinition Duration — Retail System

system_warranty.name: Platinum Protection Roofing System Limited Warranty
system_warranty.requirements: All Owens Corning components: shingles, starter, hip & ridge, plus at least one OC underlayment AND one OC ventilation product

documents.label: TruDefinition Duration — Shingles Data Sheet (Owens Corning)

base_includes: Ice & water shield at eaves, valleys, and penetrations (OC WeatherLock Mat-G)
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
base_excludes: Roof decking replacement — billed separately at $110/sheet (allowance, determined on tear-off)
Additional tear-off layers (2nd+ comp layer, cedar shake removal)
Lead pipe flashing upgrade (in lieu of neoprene boots)
Specialty siding repair under step flashing
_meta.notes: All-in $700/SQ × roof_area_sq is the customer-facing price. Itemized lines below show what's INCLUDED in that bundle for transparency on the contract — each itemized line has unit_price=0 because it's bundled. Real $-amounts are in the add_ons section for situations that go beyond the base scope.

items.description: Tear off existing composition shingles (1 layer) — dump fees included
Owens Corning ProArmor Synthetic Underlayment — full coverage
Owens Corning WeatherLock Mat-G Granulated Ice & Water Barrier — eaves (6 ft up), valleys (3 ft each side), around penetrations
Aluminum drip edge, color-matched — eaves and rakes
Owens Corning Starter Strip Shingles — eaves and rakes
Owens Corning TruDefinition Duration laminate shingles — installed. Lifetime warranty, 130 mph wind, StreakGuard algae protection. Includes waste.
items.notes: This is the all-in billing line: $700/SQ × total roof area, waste included.

items.description: Owens Corning ProEdge Hip & Ridge Shingles — color-matched
Owens Corning VentSure Strip Ridge Vent — continuous along main ridge
New aluminum step flashing at wall-to-roof intersections
Counter flashing — surface-mount or reglet, masonry chimney/parapet
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
Contractor 10-year workmanship warranty — labor + installation defects

add_ons.description: Sheathing replacement — 1/2" CDX plywood, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
add_ons.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off. Bill per-sheet.

add_ons.description: Tear off second (or additional) layer of composition shingles
add_ons.notes: Add per layer beyond the single layer included in the base price.

add_ons.description: Tear off cedar shake / shingle roof — significantly heavier than comp
add_ons.notes: Use in place of the bundled comp tear-off when removing wood roofing.

add_ons.description: Upgrade underlayment to OC Deck Defense (budget alternative — credits back the difference)
add_ons.notes: Credit. Substitutes Deck Defense for ProArmor while preserving Platinum Protection warranty.

add_ons.description: Lead pipe flashing UPGRADE in lieu of neoprene boot — 25+ year life expectation
add_ons.notes: Additive — replaces neoprene boot for high-longevity installations.

add_ons.description: Chimney flashing kit — 4-side reglet counter + step + apron, masonry chimney up to 4'×4'
add_ons.notes: Use when a brick/stone chimney needs full counter-flashing reset. Cricket is separate.

add_ons.description: Chimney cricket fabrication — for chimneys wider than 30" upslope side
add_ons.notes: Code-required per IRC R1003.20 when chimney exceeds 30" wide on upslope side.

add_ons.description: Skylight curb flashing kit — replace step + apron + head flashing around an existing skylight
add_ons.notes: Per skylight. Skylight unit replacement is separate.

warranty_disclosure: To activate the Owens Corning Platinum Protection Roofing System Limited Warranty, ALL of the following components are installed (all bundled in the $700/SQ base price): (1) TruDefinition Duration shingles, (2) Owens Corning Starter Strip Shingles, (3) ProEdge Hip & Ridge Shingles, (4) Owens Corning ProArmor underlayment, (5) Owens Corning VentSure ridge vent. Switching to non-OC components voids the system warranty — only the shingle limited warranty remains.
